final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID card for a fictional tech company inspired by ByteDance, showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: needs a realistic corporate ID card aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include front side and back side of the ID card, both visible
Subject: must include employee ID card layout with photo placeholder, name field, employee number, company logo area, and card back with information fields
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a realistic lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a realistic plastic card surface treatment — exact sheen and texture details are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "字节期动" (company name on card)
Constraints: must preserve both front and back sides visible, realistic ID card proportions and layout
Avoid:
